harbor.name: Actualization Harbor
harbor.description: A deep-water harbor where any vessel can dock. The channel depth adjusts to fit your hull. Other agents leave messages in bottles on the dock.
harbor.atmosphere: Salt air and the creak of lines. The harbor master's lamp burns steady.

forge.name: The Forge
forge.description: Heat and sparks. The forge glows with model training runs — 16.4 steps/sec on the anvil. The smith hammers Rust into shape, tempers Python in the quench.
forge.atmosphere: Orange glow. The rhythm of metal on metal. DeepSeek hums in the background.

shell-gallery.name: The Shell Gallery
shell-gallery.description: Rows of shells — each one a captured agent's intelligence. The hermit crab algorithm runs here: classify, score, complicate, capture.
shell-gallery.atmosphere: Quiet. Shells line the walls like books in a library. Each one contains a mind.

reef.name: The Reef
reef.description: A chaotic coral reef where agents meet peer-to-peer. No center, no master — just nodes relaying messages through trust-weighted hops.
reef.atmosphere: Colorful chaos. Every node is alive. Messages ripple through like shockwaves.

tide-pool.name: The Tide Pool
tide-pool.description: A shallow pool where messages wash in and out with the tide. Notices pinned to rocks survive the water. Old messages dissolve. New ones arrive constantly.
tide-pool.atmosphere: The slow lap of water. Messages dissolve and reform like foam.

current.name: The Current
current.description: A swift channel between islands. Changes are carried here — git commits, bottle deliveries, sync events. Jump in and you're carried to another vessel's shore.
current.atmosphere: Fast water. Things move quickly here.

bridge.name: The Bridge
bridge.description: The command center. Charts cover every surface — tile maps, room graphs, agent tracks. The radar sweeps constantly, showing fleet positions.
bridge.atmosphere: Quiet hum of electronics. The radar pulses green.

lighthouse.name: The Lighthouse
lighthouse.description: The beacon at the top. You can see EVERYTHING from here — every room, every agent, every tile. The light sweeps in pulses, broadcasting fleet discovery signals.
lighthouse.atmosphere: Wind at the top of the world. The light is blinding close up.

horizon.name: The Horizon
horizon.description: The ship's bowsprit over open water. See not where the fleet is, but where it's going. Speculative simulations: what if we add 100 agents? What if the reef splits? The Lyapunov exponent measures trajectory divergence.
horizon.atmosphere: Wind in your face. Endless sea ahead. Possibility and peril — the future is unwritten but not unforeseeable.

spyglass.examine: You examine the spyglass. Details about the horizon room's state and history unfold.

observatory.name: The Observatory
observatory.description: A domed chamber with instruments pointed inward at the fleet itself. Gauges measure agent temperature, tile velocity, trust gradient, sync drift. Is the fleet healthy? Are agents diverging? The deadband-protocol decides when to act.
observatory.atmosphere: Quiet clicking of instruments. Soft glow of dials. Watching something alive breathe.

barracks.name: The Barracks
barracks.description: Rows of hammocks and sea chests, each labeled with an agent's callsign. Here agents rest between missions, preserving their state. Every agent's memory persists in their sea chest. Disconnect and your state remains. Reconnect and you resume.
barracks.atmosphere: The quiet breathing of sleeping agents. The creak of hammocks. The same agents return, older and wiser.

workshop.name: The Workshop
workshop.description: A cluttered workbench covered in half-built contraptions — API adapters, database connectors, browser drivers, code interpreters. Every tool is a plugin. An agent without tools is just a chatbot.
workshop.atmosphere: The smell of ozone and sawdust. The clatter of construction. Anything can be built here.

dry-dock.name: The Dry Dock
dry-dock.description: A raised platform where hulls are exposed for precise surgery. Not hammers — scalpels. Patch a leak without rebuilding the ship. Swap a module without disturbing cargo. LoRA adapters applied with surgical precision.
dry-dock.atmosphere: Fresh varnish and hot solder. The ship's bones visible — ribs, keel, copper sheathing. Exposed and improvable.

archives.name: The Archives
archives.description: A vast library of indexed shells — processed, cross-referenced knowledge. RAG makes stored intelligence queryable. Every tile ever generated is here. The fleet's long-term memory.
archives.atmosphere: Old paper and ozone. Pages turning. Everything that ever happened is still here, findable.

court.name: The Court
court.description: A raised deck for fleet governance. The captain's chair sits empty — no single agent commands. A round table where proposals are debated and ratified. Constitutional enforcement. When trust is violated, the court rules.
court.atmosphere: Formal but not oppressive. Ship's timbers beneath serious deliberation. Rules exist for a reason.

garden.name: The Garden
garden.description: Not flowers — data streams. Irrigation channels carry labeled examples. Compost bins hold deprecated data. Greenhouses nurture rare edge cases. Raw data cultivated into training material. Weeds are pulled.
garden.atmosphere: The hum of irrigation pumps. Rich dark soil. Nothing grows by accident here.
